title: osteospermum scariosum subsp. setiferum
intro: Osteospermum scariosum subsp. setiferum, also known as the Prickly osteospermum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin issues. The health benefits of Osteospermum scariosum subsp. setiferum include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to benefit from its medicinal properties.
